name: Repolish
one_liner: A one-command, local-first CLI that makes any code repo's first impression look premium AND honest — a tailored README plus a no-BS honesty pass that flags overclaims.
notes: Name LOCKED: 'repolish' (tagline: 'repo polish in one command'). LAUNCHED public on GitHub 2026-06-23 (CI green; LICENSE MIT). NOT yet on npm — deliberate: validate honesty recall on >=5 real-world READMEs first (v0 is honestly labelled 'early'). Code lives OUTSIDE this (always-public) repo — absolute path in gitignored code-paths.local.json under slug 'repolish' (code_path null here per path-portability rule). Auto-push stays OFF (.no-auto-push) so pushes remain deliberate. Differentiator vs other README generators: the honesty pass + the real demo recording.
